# 3 Sisters Cleaning and Home Organizing

> Family-owned professional cleaning and home organizing company, operating since 2019, serving Florida (Fort Lauderdale, Boca Raton, Parkland, Weston, Delray Beach, Lighthouse Point, Southwest Ranches), New York (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens), and California (San Francisco). Six core services: regular cleaning, deep cleaning, move-in/move-out, Airbnb & vacation rental turnovers, office & commercial cleaning, and personal organizing. Also known as 3 Sisters Services. Bonded, insured, and background-checked on every visit. Built on care, trust, and flexibility.

## Services

- [Regular Cleaning](https://3sistersservices.com/services/): Recurring weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly home and office cleaning with optional add-ons
- [Deep Cleaning](https://3sistersservices.com/services/): Full reset cleaning for post-renovation, seasonal refresh, or long-untouched spaces
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://3sistersservices.com/services/): Detailed cleaning for tenants, homeowners, landlords, and property managers during transitions
- [Airbnb & Vacation Rental Cleaning](https://3sistersservices.com/services/): Same-day guest-ready turnovers with linen change and basic restock
- [Office & Commercial Cleaning](https://3sistersservices.com/services/): Custom-scheduled office and commercial cleaning around your business hours
- [Personal Organizing Services](https://3sistersservices.com/services/): Decluttering, closet and pantry organization, custom storage solutions

## Service Areas

### Florida
- Fort Lauderdale, FL
- Boca Raton, FL
- Parkland, FL
- Weston, FL
- Delray Beach, FL
- Lighthouse Point, FL
- Southwest Ranches, FL

### New York
- Manhattan, NY
- Brooklyn, NY
- Queens, NY

### California
- San Francisco, CA

## About

- [About 3 Sisters Services](https://3sistersservices.com/about/): Family-run team, who we are, how we work
- [Our Team](https://3sistersservices.com/team/): Bonded, insured, background-checked cleaners
- [Pricing](https://3sistersservices.com/pricing/): Quote-based, no public rates, free estimates
- [FAQ](https://3sistersservices.com/faq/): Booking, supplies, pets, payment, insurance, cancellation

## Trust Signals

- Family-owned and operated since 2019
- Bonded and insured on every job
- Every cleaner background-checked, screened, and trained
- Bilingual service (English and Spanish)
- Card pre-authorization — payment processed only after service is completed
- No contracts, no commitments — recurring or one-time
